title_en: Methodology and Structure of Radd al-Muhtar
content_en:
Radd al-Muhtar ala ad-Durr al-Mukhtar — The Response to the Confused on the Choice Pearl — is a hashiya (super-commentary) on ad-Durr al-Mukhtar, which is itself a commentary by al-Haskafi on Tanwir al-Absar by at-Tumurtashi. This three-level structure — original text, commentary, super-commentary — is characteristic of the later Islamic legal tradition, where each generation of scholars added its layer of explanation and correction to the preceding work. Ibn Abidin's hashiya is the final and most comprehensive layer.

The work is known as Hashiyat Ibn Abidin in common scholarly usage, which distinguishes it from the formal title. In the Hanafi tradition, it is the reference: when scholars, judges, and muftis need authoritative guidance on a Hanafi legal question, Hashiyat Ibn Abidin is the first and usually decisive source consulted. Its comprehensiveness, its reliable identification of the mu'tamad positions within the school, and its systematic engagement with the entire prior tradition make it the culmination of Hanafi legal writing.

Ibn Abidin's methodology combines several distinctive features. He engages exhaustively with the prior literature: he cites al-Hidayah, al-Kanz, al-Bahr ar-Ra'iq, al-Fatawa al-Hindiyya, and dozens of other works, noting where they agree and disagree and selecting the strongest position. He addresses questions that earlier commentators left open or treated inadequately. He incorporates discussions from responsa literature (fatawa collections) that were not included in the main commentaries. And he addresses new questions generated by the changing legal and commercial environment of his era.

The organization follows the sequence of the base text — tahara through estates — but each section is expanded into a comprehensive treatment of the relevant topic that goes far beyond the original commentary. The work runs to ten volumes in the standard edition. Ibn Abidin's mastery of fatwa literature is particularly evident in the breadth of practical questions he addresses — commercial arrangements arising from Ottoman trade practices, medical questions, questions about newly introduced technologies and substances, questions about the obligations of Muslims living under non-Muslim governance. This willingness to engage with the legal questions of his own contemporary world, and not merely to compile the classical tradition, is one of the features that gives Radd al-Muhtar its enduring practical relevance.
content_id:
Radd al-Muhtar ala ad-Durr al-Mukhtar — Jawaban bagi yang Bingung atas Mutiara Terpilih — adalah sebuah hasyiyah (super-komentar) atas ad-Durr al-Mukhtar, yang merupakan komentar al-Haskafi atas Tanwir al-Absar karya at-Tumurtasyi. Struktur tiga tingkat ini — teks asli, komentar, super-komentar — merupakan ciri khas tradisi hukum Islam akhir, di mana setiap generasi ulama menambahkan lapisannya sendiri berupa penjelasan dan koreksi atas karya sebelumnya. Hasyiyah Ibn Abidin adalah lapisan terakhir dan paling komprehensif.

Karya ini dikenal sebagai Hasyiyat Ibn Abidin dalam penggunaan keilmuan umum, yang membedakannya dari judul formalnya. Dalam tradisi Hanafi, inilah referensi yang dimaksud: ketika ulama, hakim, dan mufti membutuhkan panduan otoritatif tentang pertanyaan hukum Hanafi, Hasyiyat Ibn Abidin adalah sumber pertama dan biasanya bersifat menentukan yang dikonsultasikan. Kelengkapannya, identifikasinya yang andal tentang posisi mu'tamad dalam mazhab, dan keterlibatan sistematisnya dengan seluruh tradisi sebelumnya menjadikannya puncak penulisan hukum Hanafi.

Metodologi Ibn Abidin memadukan beberapa fitur khas. Beliau terlibat secara ekstensif dengan literatur sebelumnya: beliau mengutip al-Hidayah, al-Kanz, al-Bahr ar-Ra'iq, al-Fatawa al-Hindiyah, dan puluhan karya lainnya, mencatat di mana mereka sepakat dan berbeda serta memilih posisi terkuat. Beliau membahas pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang para komentator sebelumnya tinggalkan terbuka atau perlakukan secara tidak memadai. Beliau memasukkan diskusi dari literatur responsa (koleksi fatwa) yang tidak termasuk dalam komentar utama. Dan beliau membahas pertanyaan-pertanyaan baru yang dihasilkan oleh perubahan lingkungan hukum dan komersial zamannya.

Susunannya mengikuti urutan teks dasar — taharah hingga warisan — namun setiap bagian diperluas menjadi uraian komprehensif yang menjadikan karya tersebut hampir mandiri dalam cakupannya.
